info.title: ELLA Booking System API
info.description:
Welcome to the ELLA Booking System API. 

This API provides endpoints for managing rooms, assets, users, registrations, and bookings. Most modification endpoints require authentication and Admin privileges.

**Authentication:**
1. Login via `POST /api/auth/login` to receive a JWT token.
2. Copy the received token (e.g. `ey...`).
3. Enter the token in the value field to the right.


*Note: Scalar automatically adds the 'Bearer ' prefix for you.*

post.description: Creates a new user account and returns an authentication token.
Authenticates a user with email and password, returning a JWT token and user info on success.
Logs out the current user, clears the auth cookie, and invalidates their tokens.

get.description:
Retrieves the details of the currently authenticated user.

🔒 **Authentication Required**

get.summary: Lightweight user search for invite autocomplete
get.description:
Searches users by display name or email. Returns minimal data (id, name, email). Excludes banned users and the requesting user. No ManageUsers permission required.

🔒 **Authentication Required**

Retrieves a paginated list of users, optionally filtered by search, role, or status.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageUsers permission**

post.description:
Creates a new user with the provided details.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageUsers permission**

get.description:
Retrieves a specific user by their unique identifier.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageUsers permission**

put.description:
Updates a user's details by their unique identifier.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageUsers permission**

delete.description:
Permanently deletes a user by their unique identifier.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageUsers permission**

post.description:
Bans or unbans a user. If banned, all active tokens are revoked.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageUsers permission**

Invalidates all existing tokens for a specific user.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageUsers permission**

put.description:
Directly updates permission flags for a specific user. Sets template_id to the value in the DTO (null for custom overrides).

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageUsers permission**

post.summary: Apply a permission template to a user
post.description:
Copies all permission flags from the specified template into the user's permissions row and stores the template_id for future propagation.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageUsers permission**

get.summary: Get campus IDs for a user
get.description:
Retrieves the list of campus IDs associated with a user.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageUsers permission**

put.summary: Set campus associations for a user
put.description:
Replaces all campus associations for a user.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageUsers permission**

get.summary: Get class IDs for a user
get.description:
Retrieves the list of class IDs associated with a user.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageUsers permission**

put.summary: Set class associations for a user
put.description:
Replaces all class associations for a user.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageUsers permission**

get.description:
Retrieves all rooms. Optionally filter by room type or campus.

🔒 **Authentication Required**

post.description:
Creates a new room. You can optionally provide a list of 'assetIds' to link existing assets.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageRooms permission**

get.description:
Retrieves a specific room by its unique identifier.

🔒 **Authentication Required**

put.description:
Updates a room's details. Providing 'assetIds' will REPLACE the room's entire asset inventory.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageRooms permission**

delete.description:
Permanently deletes a room and optionally its bookings.

Pass `?force=true` to cascade-delete all bookings.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageRooms permission**

get.description:
Retrieves all available room types.

🔒 **Authentication Required**

post.description:
Creates a new room type.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageRooms permission**

get.description:
Retrieves a specific room type by its unique identifier.

🔒 **Authentication Required**

Retrieves a list of all available room asset types (e.g., Whiteboard, Projector).

🔒 **Authentication Required**

post.description:
Creates a new asset type.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageRooms permission**

get.description:
Retrieves a specific asset type by its unique identifier.

🔒 **Authentication Required**

put.description:
Updates an existing asset type.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageRooms permission**

delete.description:
Permanently deletes an asset type.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageRooms permission**

get.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of bookings, optionally filtered by user, room, date range, status, or search.
When groupBy is provided, paginates by groups (e.g., 10 rooms per page) and returns all bookings for those groups.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageBookings permission**

post.description:
Creates a new booking for the authenticated user.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires bookRoom permission**

put.description:
Updates the status of a specific booking. Users can cancel their own bookings; managers can update any booking.

🔒 **Authentication Required**

get.description:
Retrieves paginated bookings created by the authenticated user. Use timeFilter=upcoming or timeFilter=history to filter.

🔒 **Authentication Required**

Returns whether the public booking form is enabled (system user not banned), plus the system user ID.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageBookings permission**

post.description:
Toggles the public booking form by banning/unbanning the system user.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageBookings permission**

Accepts a pending invitation or self-registers the authenticated user for a booking. If already registered, returns success. If declined, changes status back to registered.

🔒 **Authentication Required**

post.summary: Decline or unregister from a booking
post.description:
Sets the user's registration status to 'declined'. Works from any current status (invited or registered). The row stays visible so the user can re-accept later via POST `/{id}/register`.

🔒 **Authentication Required**

delete.description:
Permanently deletes the invitation row for a specific user. Unlike declining, this cannot be undone — the user would need to be re-invited. Only the booking owner can perform this action.

🔒 **Authentication Required** — **Owner Only**

get.summary: Get bookings by user's registration status
get.description:
Retrieves bookings where the authenticated user has a registration with the specified status(es).

**Query parameters:**
- `statuses` — comma-separated list: `invited`, `registered`, `declined` (default: all)
- `timeFilter` — `upcoming` (end_time >= now) or `history` (end_time < now) (default: all)

🔒 **Authentication Required**

get.summary: Get confirmed participants for a booking
get.description:
Returns all users with status 'registered' for a specific booking (i.e. confirmed attendees).

🔒 **Authentication Required**

get.summary: Get pending invitations for a booking
get.description:
Returns all users with status 'invited' for a specific booking (i.e. haven't accepted or declined yet).

🔒 **Authentication Required**

post.description:
Bulk-invites users by ID. Users who already have a registration row (invited, registered, or declined) are skipped. Returns the count of newly created invitations.

🔒 **Authentication Required**

post.summary: Invite all members of class(es) to a booking
post.description:
Resolves all users in the given class(es) and bulk-invites them. Users who already have a registration row are skipped. The booking owner is excluded.

🔒 **Authentication Required**

post.summary: Re-sync class invitations for a booking
post.description:
Re-invites any new members of the booking's linked class(es) who don't yet have a registration row. Useful when class membership has changed after the initial invitation.

🔒 **Authentication Required**

get.description:
Returns all users belonging to the given class(es). Used to preview who will be invited before sending invitations, allowing the teacher to exclude specific users.

🔒 **Authentication Required**

Returns the named permission templates (Student, Educator, Admin, etc.) auto-synced with the current database permission columns. No authentication required — the frontend needs this before/during login.

put.description:
Replaces the full set of named permission templates. The server will auto-sync with the DB columns before persisting.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageRoles permission**

get.description:
Retrieves a list of all campuses.

🔒 **Authentication Required**

post.description:
Creates a new campus.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageCampuses permission**

get.description:
Retrieves a specific campus by its unique identifier.

🔒 **Authentication Required**

put.description:
Updates an existing campus.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageCampuses permission**

delete.description:
Permanently deletes a campus.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageCampuses permission**

get.description:
Retrieves a list of all classes.

🔒 **Authentication Required**

post.description:
Creates a new class.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageClasses permission**

get.description:
Retrieves a specific class by its unique identifier.

🔒 **Authentication Required**

put.description:
Updates an existing class.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageClasses permission**

delete.description:
Permanently deletes a class.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageClasses permission**

get.summary: Get campus IDs for a class
get.description:
Retrieves the list of campus IDs associated with a class.

🔒 **Authentication Required**

put.summary: Set campus associations for a class
put.description:
Replaces all campus associations for a class.

🔒 **Authentication Required**
🔑 **Requires manageClasses permission**

get.description: Retrieves all rooms with details for the public booking form. No authentication required.
Retrieves all campuses for the public booking form. No authentication required.

get.summary: Check if the booking form is enabled
get.description: Returns whether the public booking form is currently accepting submissions.

post.description:
Creates a new booking with Pending status via the public booking form.
The booking must be approved by an administrator before it becomes active.

⚠️ **Rate limited** — max 5 requests per 15 minutes per IP.

Bearer.description: JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme.
